data.title: First Horizon Corporation Announces Redemption of Series C Preferred Stock and Corresponding Series C Depositary Shares
data.description: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN), based in Memphis, Tennessee, disclosed on April 1, 2026, its plan to redeem all existing shares of its 6.600% Fixed-to-Floating Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series C. The redemption date is set for May 1, 2026. This action indicates a significant move on the part of First Horizon Corporation to manage its capital structure. The redemption of the Series C stock suggests a strategic financial decision by the corporation, possibly impacting shareholders and investors.

data.description: In Cheyenne, Wyoming on April 1, 2026, U.S. Gold Corp. (NASDAQ: USAU) revealed a range of value-boosting prospects for its CK Gold Project in southeast Wyoming. The project, referred to as CK, has received full permits and is ready for implementation. This announcement follows the recent disclosure of...

data.title: Avery Dennison to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Avery Dennison Corporation, a top global materials science and digital identification solutions firm, is set to conduct its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The earnings release for the first quarter of 2026 will be published around 6:45 a.m. ET on the same day. The conference call will be broadcast live and a replay will subsequently be accessible on Avery Dennison's Investor Relations website.

data.title: Carter’s and Umbro Bring the World’s Game to Its Youngest Fans with Limited-Edition Soccer Kits
data.description: Atlanta-based company Carter’s Inc. and iconic brand Umbro are teaming up to introduce a special collaboration catering to young sports enthusiasts. The limited-edition collection, set to debut on April 6, will immerse kids in the world of soccer, coinciding with the rising enthusiasm surrounding the sport worldwide. Through this partnership, the Carter’s x Umbro line captures the essence and enthusiasm of soccer, offering a unique perspective on one of the most significant events in international sports. The initiative aims to engage the youngest demographic with the spirit of the beautiful game.

data.title: Brigade to showcase two new vehicle safety solutions at the CV Show 2026
data.description: A company based in South Darenth, England, is set to showcase its latest commercial vehicle safety innovations at the upcoming CV Show from April 21st to 23rd, 2026. Brigade's expert team will present two new safety solutions alongside their existing product line. The recently launched AI-driven products aim to enhance safety for commercial vehicles on the road.

data.title: CTA Construction Managers Completes Exterior Envelope on Green Meadow Elementary School in Maynard, MA
data.description: CTA Construction Managers have recently announced the successful finish of the exterior building envelope for the new project in MAYNARD, Mass. This milestone includes roofing systems, wall assemblies, windows, air & vapor barriers, and waterproofing. The news was shared on April 1, 2026, through PRNewswire.

data.title: AAVE priced at $99.32, may reach $110-128 by May 2026. Bearish MACD, neutral RSI signal potential recovery if $104 resistance breaks.
data.description: The digital currency AAVE is currently trading at $99.32, showing conflicting indications in the market - a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains neutral. Analysts predict a potential price rebound to a range between $110 and $128 over the next four weeks, contingent upon a breach of the critical resistance level at $104.

data.title: Wallbox Agrees on the Terms to Implement a Comprehensive Restructuring Plan
data.description: Wallbox N.V., a leading global company in electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, has finalized the terms for a comprehensive restructuring plan. The plan is subject to the signing of relevant documents, court approval, and customary conditions. Following the initial agreement on December 1, 2025, and March 4, 202_, this development marks a significant step in the company's strategic restructuring. Wallbox, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WBX, is moving forward with this plan to enhance its operations and financial stability.

data.title: Floating Offshore Wind Market worth $25.40 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it has been reported that the worldwide Floating Offshore Wind Market is anticipated to expand significantly. MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts show that the market size will increase from USD 3.16 billion in 2026 to USD 25.40 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 51.7% over the forecast period.

data.title: Flagship Pioneering and AWS Announce Collaboration to Accelerate Drug Discovery and Life Sciences Innovation
data.description: Flagship Pioneering, a hub of scientific innovation based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, announced on April 1, 2026, that its early-stage companies will be granted access to AWS cloud credits, technical assistance, and AI tools to expedite drug discovery and enhance scientific platforms. This move is intended to boost innovation, with the selected companies set to benefit from resources to accelerate their research endeavors.

data.title: Immunic Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: In New York on April 1, 2026, Immunic, Inc. (Nasdaq: IMUX), a leading biotech firm focusing on innovative oral treatments for neurologic conditions, revealed receiving a written Notice from the Listing Qualifications Department.
